name: DeepSeek
description: Registers DeepSeek as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback DeepSeek API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: DeepSeek API key
settings.description: DeepSeek API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.description: Refreshes DeepSeek chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
